text.title: trade-off-decision-matrix Core Rules
text.summary: Migrated testable rules for trade-off-decision-matrix. Verify and refine before relying on for production.

rule.statement: Use a 1-5 scoring scale (not 1-10) for both weights and scores. Calculate weighted score = raw score x weight. Sum weighted scores per option. Run sensitivity analysis: identify which criteria most influence the outcome and test what happens if the top criterion weight changes by ±2.
rule.rationale: Humans cannot reliably distinguish 7 from 8 on a 1-10 scale, and LLMs bias high. 1-5 gives enough granularity while keeping scores meaningful. Sensitivity analysis prevents false confidence in a matrix where top options are within 5% — if they tie within 5%, the criteria are too coarse.
